Serialized Form

  • Package com.github.scribejava.apis.openid

    • Class com.github.scribejava.apis.openid.OpenIdOAuth2AccessToken extends OAuth2AccessToken implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -4534058186528117610L

      • Serialized Fields

        • openIdToken

          String openIdToken
          Le jeton d'identité (ID Token) fait partie de la spécification OpenID Connect. Il peut contenir des informations utilisateur que vous pouvez extraire directement.

  • Package com.github.scribejava.core.integration

    • Class com.github.scribejava.core.integration.AuthSessionContext extends Object implements Serializable

        • nonce

          String nonce

        • pkce

          PKCE pkce

        • state

          String state

  • Package com.github.scribejava.core.model

    • Class com.github.scribejava.core.model.DeviceAuthorization extends Token implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • deviceCode

          String deviceCode
          device_code

          REQUIRED. The device verification code.

        • expiresInSeconds

          int expiresInSeconds
          expires_in

          REQUIRED. The lifetime in seconds of the "device_code" and "user_code".

        • intervalSeconds

          int intervalSeconds
          interval

          OPTIONAL. The minimum amount of time in seconds that the client SHOULD wait between polling requests to the token endpoint. If no value is provided, clients MUST use 5 as the default.

        • userCode

          String userCode
          user_code

          REQUIRED. The end-user verification code.

        • verificationUri

          String verificationUri
          verification_uri

          REQUIRED. The end-user verification URI on the authorization server. The URI should be short and easy to remember as end users will be asked to manually type it into their user agent.

        • verificationUriComplete

          String verificationUriComplete
          verification_uri_complete

          OPTIONAL. A verification URI that includes the "user_code" (or other information with the same function as the "user_code"), which is designed for non-textual transmission.

    • Class com.github.scribejava.core.model.OAuth2AccessToken extends Token implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      8901381135476613449L

      • Serialized Fields

        • accessToken

          String accessToken
          Le jeton d'accès délivré par le serveur d'autorisation.

        • expiresIn

          Integer expiresIn
          La durée de vie en secondes du jeton d'accès.

        • refreshToken

          String refreshToken
          Le jeton de renouvellement (Refresh Token).
          See Also:
          RFC 6749, Section 6 (Refreshing an Access Token)

        • scope

          String scope
          La portée (scope) du jeton d'accès.
          See Also:
          RFC 6749, Section 3.3 (Access Token Scope)

        • tokenType

          String tokenType
          Le type de jeton (ex: Bearer).
          See Also:
          RFC 6749, Section 7.1 (Access Token Types)

    • Class com.github.scribejava.core.model.OAuth2AccessTokenErrorResponse extends OAuthResponseException implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      2309424849700276816L

      • Serialized Fields

        • error

          OAuth2Error error

        • errorDescription

          String errorDescription

        • errorUri

          URI errorUri

      1309424849700276816L

      -8409640649946468092L

          String rawResponse
